# terrible_fortinet_fortios_fortios_log_fortianalyzer_cloud_override_setting (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `access_token` (String) Token-based authentication. Generated from GUI of Fortigate.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enable_log` (Boolean) Enable/Disable logging for task.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `log_fortianalyzer_cloud_override_setting` (String) Override FortiAnalyzer Cloud settings.
- `member_path` (String) Member attribute path to operate on. Delimited by a slash character if there are more than one attribute. Parameter marked with member_path is legitimate for doing member operation.
- `member_state` (String) Add or delete a member under specified attribute path. When member_state is specified, the state option is ignored.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vdom` (String) Virtual domain, among those defined previously. A vdom is a virtual instance of the FortiGate that can be configured and used as a different unit.

### Read-Only

- `build` (String) Build number of the fortigate image
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `http_method` (String) Last method used to provision the content into FortiGate
- `http_status` (String) Last result given by FortiGate on last operation applied
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `mkey` (String) Master key (id) used in the last call to FortiGate
- `name` (String) Name of the table used to fulfill the request
- `path` (String) Path of the table used to fulfill the request
- `revision` (String) Internal revision number
- `serial` (String) Serial number of the unit
- `status` (String) Indication of the operation's result
- `version` (String) Version of the FortiGate
